discovered_test_cases.name: RT54_DEEP_008_collision_with_inherited_method_inside_block_argument
discovered_test_cases.description: Block argument fails on attribute collision only when executed.

discovered_test_cases.name: RT54_DEEP_009_collision_with_grandparent_method_via_super
discovered_test_cases.description: Using super still collides with ancestor unary method.

discovered_test_cases.name: RT54_DEEP_010_collision_after_parent_creates_other_attrs
discovered_test_cases.description: Valid attribute work happens first; later collision must still be detected.

discovered_test_cases.name: RT54_DEEP_011_collision_inside_nested_returned_block
discovered_test_cases.description: Nested returned block fails later on attribute collision.

discovered_test_cases.name: RT54_DEEP_012_collision_after_attribute_chain_setup
discovered_test_cases.description: Prior valid state changes must not hide later collision.
